def negative_model_eval_mode_missing():
    rule_id = "model_eval_mode_missing"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Torch-style inference paths run model(...) without obvious eval() or inference mode setup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
